properties.areaDesc: San Diego County Coastal Areas; San Bernardino and Riverside County Valleys-The Inland Empire; San Diego County Inland Valleys; Orange County Coastal; Orange County Inland
properties.headline: Heat Advisory issued March 11 at 9:52PM PDT until March 13 at 8:00PM PDT by NWS San Diego CA
properties.description:
* WHAT...High temperatures from the low to mid 80s near the coast
and low to mid 90s for the valleys and inland Orange County
expected.

* WHERE...Orange County Coastal Areas, Orange County Inland Areas,
San Bernardino and Riverside County Valleys-The Inland Empire, San
Diego County Coastal Areas, and San Diego County Valleys.

* WHEN...From 10 AM Thursday to 8 PM PDT Friday.

* IMPACTS...Hot temperatures may cause heat illnesses.

* ADDITIONAL DETAILS...Very warm temperatures are expected to
continue into the weekend and beyond. Elevated overnight lows will
limit overnight relief from the heat.
properties.instruction:
Drink plenty of fluids, stay in an air-conditioned room, stay out of
the sun, and check up on relatives and neighbors.

Take extra precautions when you are outside. Wear lightweight and loose
fitting clothing. Try to limit strenuous activities to early morning
or evening. Take action when you see symptoms of heat exhaustion and
heat stroke.

NWSheadline: HEAT ADVISORY REMAINS IN EFFECT FROM 10 AM THURSDAY TO 8 PM PDT FRIDAY

properties.areaDesc: San Luis Obispo County Beaches; San Luis Obispo County Inland Central Coast; Santa Lucia Mountains; Santa Barbara County Central Coast Beaches; Santa Barbara County Inland Central Coast; Santa Ynez Valley; Santa Barbara County Southwestern Coast; Santa Barbara County Southeastern Coast; Santa Ynez Mountains Western Range; Santa Ynez Mountains Eastern Range
properties.headline: Heat Advisory issued March 11 at 11:11AM PDT until March 13 at 8:00PM PDT by NWS Los Angeles/Oxnard CA
properties.description:
* WHAT...Temperatures of 85 to 95 expected.

* WHERE...San Luis Obispo County Beaches, San Luis Obispo County
Inland Central Coast, Santa Barbara County Central Coast Beaches,
Santa Barbara County Inland Central Coast, Santa Barbara County
Southeastern Coast, Santa Barbara County Southwestern Coast, Santa
Lucia Mountains, Santa Ynez Mountains Eastern Range, Santa Ynez
Mountains Western Range, and Santa Ynez Valley.

* WHEN...From 10 AM Thursday to 8 PM PDT Friday.

* IMPACTS...There is a high risk for heat illness for sensitive
populations including the very young, the very old, those without
air conditioning, and those active outdoors.
properties.instruction:
Drink plenty of fluids, stay in an air-conditioned room, stay out of
the sun, and check up on relatives and neighbors.

Take extra precautions when you are outside. Wear lightweight and loose
fitting clothing. Try to limit strenuous activities to early morning
or evening. Take action when you see symptoms of heat exhaustion and
heat stroke.

NWSheadline: HEAT ADVISORY REMAINS IN EFFECT FROM 10 AM THURSDAY TO 8 PM PDT FRIDAY

properties.headline: Heat Advisory issued March 11 at 11:11AM PDT until March 13 at 8:00PM PDT by NWS Los Angeles/Oxnard CA
properties.description:
* WHAT...Widespread temperatures of 90 to 100 expected.

* WHERE...A portion of southwest California.

* WHEN...From 10 AM Thursday to 8 PM PDT Friday.

* IMPACTS...There is a high risk for heat illness for sensitive
populations including the very young, the very old, those without
air conditioning, and those active outdoors.

* ADDITIONAL DETAILS...Well above normal temperatures will continue
well into next week, and additional Heat Advisories or Extreme
Heat Warnings may be needed.
properties.instruction:
Drink plenty of fluids, stay in an air-conditioned room, stay out of
the sun, and check up on relatives and neighbors.

Take extra precautions when you are outside. Wear lightweight and loose
fitting clothing. Try to limit strenuous activities to early morning
or evening. Take action when you see symptoms of heat exhaustion and
heat stroke.
